Headline: Blue Line trains Experiencing Delays; Boarding change between UIC-Halsted and Illinois Medical District
ShortDescription: Blue Line service running w/delays due to a medical emergency at Racine; board all trains on the O'Hare-bound side at UIC-Halsted, Racine and Medical District.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line service running w/delays due to a medical emergency at Racine.

Trains, in both directions, are running on the same track between UIC-Halsted and Illinois Medical District.

Board/exit all trains on the O'Hare-bound side at UIC-Halsted, Racine and Illinois Medical District.

  • Forest Park-bound shuttle buses between LaSalle and Forest Park has concluded at 1:45 a.m.

We're working to restore normal service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.
